= scripts
:description: Project directory

This directory is part of the paint.type project.

== Purpose

Project directory.


As a Level 3 directory (`third_party/gossamer/scripts/`), it supports the overall
project structure.

== Contents by Functional Grouping\n\n=== Configuration\n\n* `install-desktop.sh` — Shell script\n* `test-with-display.sh` — Shell script\n\n=== Source Files\n\n* `ssg-build-runner.zig` — ssg-build-runner configuration or data\n\n=== Other Files\n\n* `md-to-html.awk` — md-to-html configuration or data\n* `template-sub.awk` — template-sub configuration or data\n\n
== Purpose of Each Component

Each file in this directory serves a specific purpose.

*Configuration files* define build, test, and deployment parameters.\n
*Source files* implement core functionality.\n
*Other files* support directory operations.\n

== AI Manifest Structure

* `0.3-AI-MANIFEST.a2ml` (this file) - Level 3 manifest for `third_party/gossamer/scripts/`
